emails.subject: E-Next Generation Docs
emails.body: I'll have to send the notice separately. John's number is 713 751-3254. Kay Forwarded by Kay Mann/Corp/Enron on 03/16/2001 11:53 AM From: Suzanne Adams@ECT on 01/17/2001 02:47 PM

emails.subject: Re: E-Next Generation Docs
emails.body: Re: E-Next Generation Docs Thanks! I really could use a copy of the Blue Dog contract, especially if you redacted it to give out to bidders. Thanks! Kay Mann@ENRON 03/16/2001 11:53 AM
